positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical woodland forest scene, featuring silhouetted deer jumping through glowing bioluminescent flora and delicate, stylized crescent moons hanging from ancient tree branches. The palette should emphasize deep indigo, sapphire blue, neon teal accents, and pops of soft glowing gold. The style is sophisticated vector art meets ethereal neo-traditional ink wash, designed for high-contrast screen printing. Composition must be centralized, featuring symmetrical balance for apparel use. Clean lines, solid blocking, and vibrant glowing effects are key.
negative: low contrast, blur, noisy, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, writing, signature, sketch, ugly, dirty, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, disfigured, amateur
